## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `sugi` in a repo with…
2. Press key…
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages, screenshots, or terminal recordings if helpful.

## Environment

- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11 -->
- Terminal: <!-- e.g. iTerm2, Windows Terminal, Alacritty -->
- sugi version: <!-- output of `sugi --version` -->
- Go version: <!-- output of `go version`, if built from source -->

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem here.
